---
title: "About UTKa DataLab"
---

UTKa DataLab is a joint initiative between **Kadaster** (the Dutch Land Registry) and the **University of Twente**, aimed at bridging academic research and real-world public data infrastructure. Researchers work under dual supervision from both institutions, combining scientific rigor with practical impact.

The lab consists of **2 PhD candidates** and **3 Engineering Doctorate (EngD) students**.

## Mission

...

## Open Science

...
